'''Sanani''' was a pet [[Voorpak/Legends|voorpak]],<ref name="DB" /> a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]],<ref name="Wildlife">''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]''</ref> who was owned by the [[Naboo (people)/Legends|Naboo]] [[Youngling/Legends|child]] [[Ryoo Naberrie/Legends|Ryoo Naberrie]]. Naberrie loved Sanani and often dressed the voorpak up to engage in imaginary adventures,<ref name="DB" /> which amused her [[Parent/Legends|mother]], [[Sola Naberrie/Legends|Sola Naberrie]].<ref name="FF">{{DB|character|ryoonaberrie|Naberrie, Ryoona}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Sanani was first mentioned in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry for Ryoo Naberrie, which was published in [[2002]].<ref name="DB" />
